form.formComment: Returns from a 46-day let-up. Most recently 8th of 13 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on February 25 over 1400m, 3 len behind Who's In Dev with 58.5kg at $20. The race before that 4th of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on February 20 over 1100m, 4 len behind Rushonova carrying 58.5kg at $11. In a suitable race and is among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Returns from a 46-day let-up. Most recently 8th of 13 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on February 25 over 1400m, 3 len behind Who's In Dev with 58.5kg at $20. The race before that 4th of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on February 20 over 1100m, 4 len behind Rushonova carrying 58.5kg at $11. In a suitable race and is among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed with Magnolia Sky near the 600m.

form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on April 3 over 1200m, 7 len behind California Flyer carrying 57kg at $5.50. The start before that raced on the pace when 3rd of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Genuine Lady carrying 58.5kg at $5.50. Top-three prospects on his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). At the latest run second last of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on April 3 over 1200m, 7 len behind California Flyer carrying 57kg at $5.50. The start before that raced on the pace when 3rd of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Genuine Lady carrying 58.5kg at $5.50. Top-three prospects on his best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in over the concluding stages.
Raced 4 wide in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 10th of 13 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on June 8 over 1100m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Daytona Diva carrying 57kg at $26. Went for a break before returning 6th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Dina Tycoon with 56.5kg at $9. Expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Third race start. First start 10th of 13 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw on June 8 over 1100m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Daytona Diva carrying 57kg at $26. Went for a break before returning 6th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Dina Tycoon with 56.5kg at $9. Expected to do much better.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 37-day let-up. At the latest run 8th of 10 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1450m, 5.5 len behind Man Of The Sea carrying 59kg at $14. The race before that settled back and ran on when 5th of 8 at Moe 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1200m, 3 len behind Hook 'N' Spur with 58kg at $6. Has ability and is among the leading chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Comes here off a 37-day let-up. At the latest run 8th of 10 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1450m, 5.5 len behind Man Of The Sea carrying 59kg at $14. The race before that settled back and ran on when 5th of 8 at Moe 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1200m, 3 len behind Hook 'N' Spur with 58kg at $6. Has ability and is among the leading chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Raced wide for the majority of the event.

form.formComment: First starter by Alpine Eagle out of Don't Be Nasty. Has a total of two trials leading in today's debut. Betting watch.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Alpine Eagle out of Don't Be Nasty. Has a total of two trials leading in today's debut. Betting watch.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw November 26 over 1100m, 2 len behind Zulu Fields with 55kg at $4.20. When resuming last campaign fourth in a small field at Launceston Mdn-Sw October 3 over 1100m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Novalargo with 54kg at $18. Anticipating her to hit the ground running this campaign.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Resuming after a spell of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw November 26 over 1100m, 2 len behind Zulu Fields with 55kg at $4.20. When resuming last campaign fourth in a small field at Launceston Mdn-Sw October 3 over 1100m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Novalargo with 54kg at $18. Anticipating her to hit the ground running this campaign.

form.formComment: First starter by Spieth out of Snicki Minaj. Trialled on March 23 when second at Hobart over 800m. Barrier an advantage. Capable of making a bold start to her career.

formComments.title: TAB
